Footer.tagline: Gear management for the obsessed. Track your gear, build loadouts, and explore the great outdoors with confidence.
Footer.followUs: Follow us for updates and inspiration.

Hero.title: Master Your Loadout
Hero.subtitle: Organize your gear, plan your adventures, conquer the outdoors.

Landing.heroTitle: Organize Your Gear. Conquer the Trail.
Landing.heroSubtitle: The ultimate gear management platform for outdoor enthusiasts. Track every item, build perfect loadouts, and never forget essential gear again.

painPoints.title: The Struggle Is Real
painPoints.subtitle: Every outdoor enthusiast knows these frustrations. We've been there too.

spreadsheets.title: Spreadsheet Hell
spreadsheets.description: Endless rows and columns trying to track your gear. Multiple files, lost updates, and no way to visualize your loadouts.

manual.title: Manual Data Entry
manual.description: Hours spent researching specs, weights, and prices. Copy-pasting from manufacturer sites and forums.

guessing.title: Guessing Your Pack Weight
guessing.description: Standing on a scale with your pack, doing math in your head. Never quite sure if you've got everything you need.

solutions.title: Everything You Need, Beautifully Organized
solutions.subtitle: We built the tool we always wished existed. Here's how GearShack transforms your gear game.

inventory.title: Your Complete Gear Library
inventory.description: Every piece of gear, documented with photos, specs, and purchase info. Search, filter, and find anything instantly.
inventory.benefit1: Auto-populate specs from our gear database
inventory.benefit2: Track condition, purchase date, and warranty
inventory.benefit3: Beautiful photo galleries for each item

loadouts.title: Build Perfect Loadouts
loadouts.description: Create packing lists for any adventure. See total weight, spot gaps, and never forget essential gear again.
loadouts.benefit2: Copy and customize for different trips

community.title: Learn from the Community
community.description: Connect with fellow outdoor enthusiasts. Share your setups, get feedback, and discover new gear.
community.benefit2: Get honest gear reviews from users
community.benefit3: Find inspiration for your next adventure

wishlist.title: Plan Your Next Purchase
wishlist.description: Track gear you're eyeing. Compare options, set budgets, and make informed decisions.

organize.title: Organize Everything
organize.description: Catalog all your gear with detailed specs, weights, and images. Know exactly what you own.

loadouts.title: Build Smart Loadouts
loadouts.description: Create weight-optimized packing lists for any adventure. See total weight at a glance.

share.title: Share & Discover
share.description: Join a community of outdoor enthusiasts. Share your setups and discover new gear.

testimonial1.quote: GearGraph changed how I organize my hiking gear. No more forgotten items on the trail!
testimonial1.author: Alex M., Thru-Hiker

testimonial2.quote: Finally, a tool that understands the obsession with gear weight. My pack has never been lighter.
testimonial2.author: Sarah K., Ultralight Backpacker

testimonial3.quote: The loadout feature saved me hours of planning before my PCT section hike.
testimonial3.author: Mike R., Weekend Warrior

pricing.title: Simple, Honest Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more.

welcome.title: Welcome to Gearshack!
welcome.subtitle: Your ultimate companion for outdoor gear management. Let's take a quick tour of the key features.

feature1.title: Build Your Inventory
feature1.description: Track all your outdoor gear in one place with detailed specs and photos.

feature2.title: Create Smart Loadouts
feature2.description: Plan trips by assembling gear lists with weight tracking and optimization.

feature3.title: Join the Community
feature3.description: Connect with fellow outdoor enthusiasts, share tips, and discover new gear.

inventory.title: Your Gear Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Keep track of everything you own. Add gear items with photos, weight, and detailed specifications.

feature1.title: Add New Gear
feature1.description: Quickly add items with our smart product search that auto-fills specifications.

feature2.title: Smart Search
feature2.description: Find any item instantly with powerful search and filtering options.

feature3.title: Photo Management
feature3.description: Upload photos with automatic background removal for clean, professional looks.

loadouts.title: Trip Loadouts
loadouts.subtitle: Create packing lists for your adventures. Track weights and ensure you never forget essential gear.

feature1.title: Weight Tracking
feature1.description: See base weight, consumables, and worn items. Optimize your pack for any trip.

feature2.title: Trip Planning
feature2.description: Organize loadouts by activity type and season. Clone and modify for quick trip prep.

feature3.title: AI Hero Images
feature3.description: Generate beautiful cover images for your loadouts using AI-powered image creation.

community.title: Community Hub
community.subtitle: Connect with other outdoor enthusiasts. Share experiences, get advice, and discover new gear.

feature1.title: Gear Shakedowns
feature1.description: Get expert feedback on your loadouts from experienced community members.

feature2.title: Discussion Board
feature2.description: Ask questions, share trip reports, and discuss gear with the community.

feature3.title: Marketplace
feature3.description: Buy, sell, and trade gear with trusted community members.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.subtitle: Customize your experience and manage your settings to get the most out of Gearshack.

feature1.title: Personal Profile
feature1.description: Add your trail name, location, and connect with other hikers.

feature2.title: Settings
feature2.description: Customize appearance, notifications, and display preferences.

feature3.title: Notifications
feature3.description: Stay updated on community activity, messages, and gear updates.

feature4.title: Privacy Controls
feature4.description: Control who can see your profile, gear, and activity.

beta.title: Welcome Beta Tester!
beta.subtitle: Thank you for being part of our beta testing program. Your feedback helps us build a better Gearshack.

feature1.title: Report Bugs
feature1.description: Found something that doesn't work right? Let us know so we can fix it.

feature2.title: Share Feedback
feature2.description: Have ideas for improvements? We'd love to hear your suggestions.

feature3.title: Early Access
feature3.description: As a beta tester, you get first access to new features before anyone else.

beta.feedbackHint: You can report bugs or share feedback anytime via the Feedback option in your profile menu.
